revision.comment: スタブ
revision.text:
'''戊辰'''（つちのえたつ、ぼしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて5番目で、前は[[丁卯]]、次は[[己巳]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==戊辰の年==
==戊辰の日== ===[[選日]]===

revision.comment: 戊辰戦争、暦注下段
revision.text:
'''戊辰'''（つちのえたつ、ぼしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて5番目で、前は[[丁卯]]、次は[[己巳]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==戊辰の年== 1868年には[[戊辰戦争]]があった。
==戊辰の日== ===[[選日]]=== ===[[暦注下段]]=== *[[納音]]が土性の人の[[五墓日]] *[[旧暦]]3月・4月の場合は[[凶会日]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycles}} '''Earth Dragon''' is a year in the [[sexagenary cycle]]
干支の組み合わせの5番目で、前は丁卯、次は己巳である。辰(龍)は、十二支で唯一の架空の動物。陰陽五行では、[[Heavenly Stems|十干]]の戊は陽の[[Soil (disambiguation)|土]]、[[Earthly Branches|十二支]]の[[Dragon (zodiac)|辰]]は陽の[[Soil (disambiguation)|土]]で、[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|比和]]である。
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Earth Dragon''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]]

{{Sexagenary cycles}} '''Earth Dragon''' is a year in the [[sexagenary cycle]]
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
Translated with www.DeepL.com/Translator (free version) == Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Earth Dragon''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycles}} '''''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[category:new pages]] [[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''戊辰'''（つちのえたつ、ぼどのたつ、ぼしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの5番目で、前は[[丁卯]]、次は[[己巳]]である。辰(龍)は、十二支で唯一の架空の動物。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って8が余る年が戊辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[8年]] *[[68年]] *[[128年]] *[[188年]] *[[248年]] *[[308年]] *[[368年]] *[[428年]] *[[488年]] *[[548年]] *[[608年]] *[[668年]] *[[728年]] *[[788年]] *[[848年]] *[[908年]] *[[968年]] | *[[1028年]] *[[1088年]] *[[1148年]] *[[1208年]] *[[1268年]] *[[1328年]] *[[1388年]] *[[1448年]] *[[1508年]] *[[1568年]] *[[1628年]] *[[1688年]] *[[1748年]] *[[1808年]] *[[1868年]] *[[1928年]] *[[1988年]] | *[[2048年]] *[[2108年]] *[[2168年]] *[[2228年]] *[[2288年]] *[[2348年]] *[[2408年]] *[[2468年]] *[[2528年]] *[[2588年]] *[[2648年]] *[[2708年]] *[[2768年]] *[[2828年]] *[[2888年]] *[[2948年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[慶応]]4・[[明治]]元(1868)年 - [[戊辰戦争]]
==戊辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[3月]]が戊辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊辰の日== 戊辰の日の[[選日]]、[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== ===暦注下段=== *[[納音]]が土性の人の[[五墓日]] *[[旧暦]]3月・4月の場合は[[凶会日]]
==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:戊辰]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:戊辰]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''戊辰'''（つちのえたつ、ぼどのたつ、ぼしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの5番目で、前は[[丁卯]]、次は[[己巳]]である。辰(龍)は、十二支で唯一の架空の動物。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って8が余る年が戊辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[8年]] *[[68年]] *[[128年]] *[[188年]] *[[248年]] *[[308年]] *[[368年]] *[[428年]] *[[488年]] *[[548年]] *[[608年]] *[[668年]] *[[728年]] *[[788年]] *[[848年]] *[[908年]] *[[968年]] | *[[1028年]] *[[1088年]] *[[1148年]] *[[1208年]] *[[1268年]] *[[1328年]] *[[1388年]] *[[1448年]] *[[1508年]] *[[1568年]] *[[1628年]] *[[1688年]] *[[1748年]] *[[1808年]] *[[1868年]] *[[1928年]] *[[1988年]] | *[[2048年]] *[[2108年]] *[[2168年]] *[[2228年]] *[[2288年]] *[[2348年]] *[[2408年]] *[[2468年]] *[[2528年]] *[[2588年]] *[[2648年]] *[[2708年]] *[[2768年]] *[[2828年]] *[[2888年]] *[[2948年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[慶応]]4・[[明治]]元(1868)年 - [[戊辰戦争]]
==戊辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[3月]]が戊辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊辰の日== 戊辰の日の[[選日]]、[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== ===暦注下段=== *[[納音]]が土性の人の[[五墓日]] *[[旧暦]]3月・4月の場合は[[凶会日]]
==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:戊辰]]

==戊辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[3月]]が戊辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊辰の日== 戊辰の日の[[選日]]、[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== ===暦注下段=== *[[納音]]が土性の人の[[五墓日]] *[[旧暦]]3月・4月の場合は[[凶会日]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycles}} '''''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]][[ja:Earth Dragon]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]]

{{Sexagenary cycles}} '''''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}

{{干支}} '''戊辰'''（つちのえたつ、ぼどのたつ、ぼしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの5番目で、前は[[丁卯]]、次は[[己巳]]である。辰(龍)は、十二支で唯一の架空の動物。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って8が余る年が戊辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[8年]] *[[68年]] *[[128年]] *[[188年]] *[[248年]] *[[308年]] *[[368年]] *[[428年]] *[[488年]] *[[548年]] *[[608年]] *[[668年]] *[[728年]] *[[788年]] *[[848年]] *[[908年]] *[[968年]] | *[[1028年]] *[[1088年]] *[[1148年]] *[[1208年]] *[[1268年]] *[[1328年]] *[[1388年]] *[[1448年]] *[[1508年]] *[[1568年]] *[[1628年]] *[[1688年]] *[[1748年]] *[[1808年]] *[[1868年]] *[[1928年]] *[[1988年]] | *[[2048年]] *[[2108年]] *[[2168年]] *[[2228年]] *[[2288年]] *[[2348年]] *[[2408年]] *[[2468年]] *[[2528年]] *[[2588年]] *[[2648年]] *[[2708年]] *[[2768年]] *[[2828年]] *[[2888年]] *[[2948年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[慶応]]4・[[明治]]元(1868)年 - [[戊辰戦争]]
==戊辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[3月]]が戊辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊辰の日== 戊辰の日の[[選日]]、[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== ===暦注下段=== *[[納音]]が土性の人の[[五墓日]] *[[旧暦]]3月・4月の場合は[[凶会日]]
==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:戊辰]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] * {{In title}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Earth Dragon-qq]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]][[ja:Earth Dragon]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Earth Dragon-qq]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Earth Dragon-qq]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''戊辰'''（つちのえたつ、ぼどのたつ、ぼしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの5番目で、前は[[丁卯]]、次は[[己巳]]である。辰(龍)は、十二支で唯一の架空の動物。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って8が余る年が戊辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[8年]] *[[68年]] *[[128年]] *[[188年]] *[[248年]] *[[308年]] *[[368年]] *[[428年]] *[[488年]] *[[548年]] *[[608年]] *[[668年]] *[[728年]] *[[788年]] *[[848年]] *[[908年]] *[[968年]] | *[[1028年]] *[[1088年]] *[[1148年]] *[[1208年]] *[[1268年]] *[[1328年]] *[[1388年]] *[[1448年]] *[[1508年]] *[[1568年]] *[[1628年]] *[[1688年]] *[[1748年]] *[[1808年]] *[[1868年]] *[[1928年]] *[[1988年]] | *[[2048年]] *[[2108年]] *[[2168年]] *[[2228年]] *[[2288年]] *[[2348年]] *[[2408年]] *[[2468年]] *[[2528年]] *[[2588年]] *[[2648年]] *[[2708年]] *[[2768年]] *[[2828年]] *[[2888年]] *[[2948年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[慶応]]4・[[明治]]元(1868)年 - [[戊辰戦争]]
==戊辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[3月]]が戊辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊辰の日== 戊辰の日の[[選日]]、[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== ===暦注下段=== *[[納音]]が土性の人の[[五墓日]] *[[旧暦]]3月・4月の場合は[[凶会日]]
==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Earth Dragon}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:戊辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Earth Dragon]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*

[[ja:戊辰]] It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]]. [[ja:戊辰]] It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}

* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]]. [[ja:戊辰]] It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]]. [[ja:戊辰]] It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] <!--Earth Dragon-->[[Category:Earth Dragon]][[sn:arth Dragon]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]]<!--Earth Dragon-->[[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] <!--Earth Dragon-->[[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Earth Dragon]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:Earth Dragon]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[en:Earth Dragon]][[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Earth Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[de:Erde-Drache]] [[af:Aardedraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Tsuch-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Drachteen]][[en:Earth Dragon]][[fr:Dragon de terreboishak]][[it:Tsu-chṳ́id]][[sn:suchinja]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Erd-Drachteen]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Mouzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]]

[[ja:戊辰]] It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
== Earth Dragon Years == The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
*
== See Also ==

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== PronounceYang Earth Dragon
==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]] [[zh-yue:戊辰]]
{{translated page|ja|戊辰|qq=Yang Earth Dragon|version=84123735|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[188]] * [[248]] * [[308]] * [[368]] * [[428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[:en:1028|1028]] * [[1088]] * [[1148]] * [[1208]] * [[1268]] * [[1328]] * [[1388]] * [[1448]] * [[1508]] * [[1568]] * [[1628]] * [[1688]] * [[1748]] * [[1808]] * [[1868]] * [[1928]] * [[1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[2108]] * [[22nd century|2168]] * [[23rd century|2228]] * [[23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title|qq=}}

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[:en:188|188]] * [[:en:248|248]] * [[:en:308|308]] * [[:en:368|368]] * [[:en:428|428]] * [[488]] * [[548]] * [[608]] * [[668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[:en:1028|1028]] * [[:en:1088|1088]] * [[:en:1148|1148]] * [[:en:1208|1208]] * [[:en:1268|1268]] * [[:en:1328|1328]] * [[:en:1388|1388]] * [[:en:1448|1448]] * [[:en:1508|1508]] * [[:en:1568|1568]] * [[:en:1628|1628]] * [[:en:1688|1688]] * [[:en:1748|1748]] * [[:en:1808|1808]] * [[:en:1868|1868]] * [[:en:1928|1928]] * [[:en:1988|1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[:en:2108|2108]] * [[:en:22nd century|2168]] * [[:en:23rd century|2228]] * [[:en:23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[AD 8|8]] * [[AD 68|68]] * [[AD 128|128]] * [[:en:188|188]] * [[:en:248|248]] * [[:en:308|308]] * [[:en:368|368]] * [[:en:428|428]] * [[:en:488|488]] * [[:en:548|548]] * [[:en:608|608]] * [[:en:668|668]] * [[728]] * [[788]] * [[848]] * [[908]] * [[968]] | * [[:en:1028|1028]] * [[:en:1088|1088]] * [[:en:1148|1148]] * [[:en:1208|1208]] * [[:en:1268|1268]] * [[:en:1328|1328]] * [[:en:1388|1388]] * [[:en:1448|1448]] * [[:en:1508|1508]] * [[:en:1568|1568]] * [[:en:1628|1628]] * [[:en:1688|1688]] * [[:en:1748|1748]] * [[:en:1808|1808]] * [[:en:1868|1868]] * [[:en:1928|1928]] * [[:en:1988|1988]] | * [[AD 2048|2048]] * [[:en:2108|2108]] * [[:en:22nd century|2168]] * [[:en:23rd century|2228]] * [[:en:23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Bó͘-chîn]] [[zh-yue:戊辰]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[:en:AD 8|8]] * [[:en:AD 68|68]] * [[:en:AD 128|128]] * [[:en:188|188]] * [[:en:248|248]] * [[:en:308|308]] * [[:en:368|368]] * [[:en:428|428]] * [[:en:488|488]] * [[:en:548|548]] * [[:en:608|608]] * [[:en:668|668]] * [[:en:728|728]] * [[:en:788|788]] * [[:en:848|848]] * [[:en:908|908]] * [[:en:968|968]] | * [[:en:1028|1028]] * [[:en:1088|1088]] * [[:en:1148|1148]] * [[:en:1208|1208]] * [[:en:1268|1268]] * [[:en:1328|1328]] * [[:en:1388|1388]] * [[:en:1448|1448]] * [[:en:1508|1508]] * [[:en:1568|1568]] * [[:en:1628|1628]] * [[:en:1688|1688]] * [[:en:1748|1748]] * [[:en:1808|1808]] * [[:en:1868|1868]] * [[:en:1928|1928]] * [[:en:1988|1988]] | * [[:en:AD 2048|2048]] * [[:en:2108|2108]] * [[:en:22nd century|2168]] * [[:en:23rd century|2228]] * [[:en:23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==
* [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[:en:AD 8|8]] * [[:en:AD 68|68]] * [[:en:AD 128|128]] * [[:en:188|188]] * [[:en:248|248]] * [[:en:308|308]] * [[:en:368|368]] * [[:en:428|428]] * [[:en:488|488]] * [[:en:548|548]] * [[:en:608|608]] * [[:en:668|668]] * [[:en:728|728]] * [[:en:788|788]] * [[:en:848|848]] * [[:en:908|908]] * [[:en:968|968]] | * [[:en:1028|1028]] * [[:en:1088|1088]] * [[:en:1148|1148]] * [[:en:1208|1208]] * [[:en:1268|1268]] * [[:en:1328|1328]] * [[:en:1388|1388]] * [[:en:1448|1448]] * [[:en:1508|1508]] * [[:en:1568|1568]] * [[:en:1628|1628]] * [[:en:1688|1688]] * [[:en:1748|1748]] * [[:en:1808|1808]] * [[:en:1868|1868]] * [[:en:1928|1928]] * [[:en:1988|1988]] | * [[:en:AD 2048|2048]] * [[:en:2108|2108]] * [[:en:22nd century|2168]] * [[:en:23rd century|2228]] * [[:en:23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==
* [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[:en:AD 8|8]] * [[:en:AD 68|68]] * [[:en:AD 128|128]] * [[:en:188|188]] * [[:en:248|248]] * [[:en:308|308]] * [[:en:368|368]] * [[:en:428|428]] * [[:en:488|488]] * [[:en:548|548]] * [[:en:608|608]] * [[:en:668|668]] * [[:en:728|728]] * [[:en:788|788]] * [[:en:848|848]] * [[:en:908|908]] * [[:en:968|968]] | * [[:en:1028|1028]] * [[:en:1088|1088]] * [[:en:1148|1148]] * [[:en:1208|1208]] * [[:en:1268|1268]] * [[:en:1328|1328]] * [[:en:1388|1388]] * [[:en:1448|1448]] * [[:en:1508|1508]] * [[:en:1568|1568]] * [[:en:1628|1628]] * [[:en:1688|1688]] * [[:en:1748|1748]] * [[:en:1808|1808]] * [[:en:1868|1868]] * [[:en:1928|1928]] * [[:en:1988|1988]] | * [[:en:AD 2048|2048]] * [[:en:2108|2108]] * [[:en:22nd century|2168]] * [[:en:23rd century|2228]] * [[:en:23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}
=== Events ===
* In 1868 the [[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]] occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]
* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==
* [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] * {{In title|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dragon== The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Associated years''' ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millenium]] ![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millenium]] ![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millenium]] |- | * [[:en:AD 8|8]] * [[:en:AD 68|68]] * [[:en:AD 128|128]] * [[:en:188|188]] * [[:en:248|248]] * [[:en:308|308]] * [[:en:368|368]] * [[:en:428|428]] * [[:en:488|488]] * [[:en:548|548]] * [[:en:608|608]] * [[:en:668|668]] * [[:en:728|728]] * [[:en:788|788]] * [[:en:848|848]] * [[:en:908|908]] * [[:en:968|968]] | * [[:en:1028|1028]] * [[:en:1088|1088]] * [[:en:1148|1148]] * [[:en:1208|1208]] * [[:en:1268|1268]] * [[:en:1328|1328]] * [[:en:1388|1388]] * [[:en:1448|1448]] * [[:en:1508|1508]] * [[:en:1568|1568]] * [[:en:1628|1628]] * [[:en:1688|1688]] * [[:en:1748|1748]] * [[:en:1808|1808]] * [[:en:1868|1868]] * [[:en:1928|1928]] * [[:en:1988|1988]] | * [[:en:AD 2048|2048]] * [[:en:2108|2108]] * [[:en:22nd century|2168]] * [[:en:23rd century|2228]] * [[:en:23rd century|2288]] * 2348 * 2408 * 2468 * 2528 * 2588 * 2648 * 2708 * 2768 * 2828 * 2888 * 2948 |}

* ==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh_min_nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh_yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh_min_nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh_yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh_yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh_yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aarddraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sìng]][[de:Erde-Drache]][[en:Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)]][[fr:Dragon de terre]][[hak:Vú-sìn]][[ja:戊辰]][[ko:무진 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Draken]][[vi:Mậu Thìn]][[za:Fouhsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sîn]][[zh-yue:戊辰]][[zh:戊辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q118701]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dragon also known as ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]] of the [[:en:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]].
It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|the ten signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]], [[:en:Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] in the [[:en:Earthly Branches|the twelve signs of the zodiac]] is Yang [[:en:Soil (disambiguation)|Earth]] [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]], which is [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Hiwa]].
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: boshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dragon also known as  ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}} of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|en|Chinese zodiac|WD=Q1976204|lt=Chinese zodiac}}. 

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=the ten signs of the zodiac}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth}}, {{ill|Dragon (zodiac)|en|Dragon (zodiac)|WD=Q731434|lt=Dragon}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=the twelve signs of the zodiac}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth}} {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa}}, which is {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: boshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dragon also known as  ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}} of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|en|Chinese zodiac|WD=Q1976204|lt=Chinese zodiac}}. 

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=the ten signs of the zodiac}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth}}, {{ill|Dragon (zodiac)|en|Dragon (zodiac)|WD=Q731434|lt=Dragon}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=the twelve signs of the zodiac}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth}} {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa}}, which is {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: boshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

<!--
==
* Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)

***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu)
***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

-->

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dragon also known as  ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}} of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|en|Chinese zodiac|WD=Q1976204|lt=Chinese zodiac}}. 

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=the ten signs of the zodiac}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth}}, {{ill|Dragon (zodiac)|en|Dragon (zodiac)|WD=Q731434|lt=Dragon}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=the twelve signs of the zodiac}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth}} {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa}}, which is {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: boshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

<!--
==
* Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのえたつ (tsuchi-no-e-tatsu)
***Onyomi: ぼどのたつ (bodo-no-tatsu)
***Onyomi: ぼしん (boshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): mujin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

-->

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dragon also known as  ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}} of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|en|Chinese zodiac|WD=Q1976204|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Chinese zodiac}}. 

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=the ten signs of the zodiac|1=Heavenly Stems}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth|1=Soil (disambiguation)}}, {{ill|Dragon (zodiac)|en|Dragon (zodiac)|WD=Q731434|lt=Dragon|1=Dragon (zodiac)}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=the twelve signs of the zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth|1=Soil (disambiguation)}} {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, which is {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: boshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dragon also known as  ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}} of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|en|Chinese zodiac|WD=Q1976204|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Chinese zodiac}}. 

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=the ten signs of the zodiac|1=Heavenly Stems}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth|1=Soil (disambiguation)}}, {{ill|Dragon (zodiac)|en|Dragon (zodiac)|WD=Q731434|lt=Dragon|1=Dragon (zodiac)}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=the twelve signs of the zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|WD=Q3199973|lt=Earth|1=Soil (disambiguation)}} {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, which is {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Hiwa|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: boshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

==Years of Yang Earth Dragon==
